ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the survey started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the survey ended */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the survey (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Intended audience for the survey */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the survey */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the survey */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statement */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the statement belongs to */,
  "statement_text" TEXT /* Text of the statement */,
  "sequence_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number to order the statements in the survey */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the statement (e.g., ease of use, system complexity) */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature or module the statement is linked to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the statement */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the statement */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statement was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statements_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the response belongs to */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statement the response is for */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response (e.g., Strongly Agree, Disagree) */,
  "response_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score corresponding to the response text */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or feedback provided by the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to submit the response (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user submitting the response */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* Browser and operating system of the user submitting the response */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES statements ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, stakeholder) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the analysis is for */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statement the analysis is for */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response (e.g., Strongly Agree, Disagree) */,
  "response_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who provided this response */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score for the statement (calculated based on response scale) */,
  "min_score" INTEGER /* Minimum score for the statement */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum score for the statement */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the scores */,
  "median_score" REAL /* Median score for the statement */,
  "mode_score" REAL /* Mode score for the statement */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the analysis */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the analysis */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was last modified */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was created or updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_analysis_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES statements ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_analysis_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)
